examples.description: sacral wound — grounded assessment synthesized from wound-bed + exudate + periwound findings, each cited (Grounded Synthesis Mode, v3.2)

transcript.text: Let's examine the sacral wound. It measures four by two by half a centimetre.
The wound bed is about eighty percent granulation with twenty percent slough. Scant serous exudate, no odour.
Periwound skin is intact, no erythema or maceration.
Continue the current foam dressing and reassess in one week.

claims.text: Working assessment: clean, predominantly granulating sacral wound (4 x 2 x 0.5 cm) with minor slough, scant serous exudate, and intact periwound skin.
claims.source_quote: The wound bed is about eighty percent granulation with twenty percent slough. Scant serous exudate, no odour.

additional_sources.source_quote: It measures four by two by half a centimetre.
Periwound skin is intact, no erythema or maceration.
